top_signals.title: Indonesian authorities target critics via online disinformation campaigns: Amnesty
top_signals.summary: Amnesty International's findings reflect growing concerns that Indonesia, the world's third-largest democracy, ​is backsliding toward army rule under President Prabowo Subianto.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump orders Fed to review giving crypto firms access to master accounts
top_signals.summary: The order urged the federal government to remove regulations that may be 'overly burdensome' to fintech innovation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
